task_completion.description: Open the CAMEO Chemicals website in a web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open and displaying the CAMEO Chemicals website (cameochemicals.noaa.gov).

task_completion.description: Correctly identify and record the ERG Guide and foam requirements for Acetone and Benzene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or document shows Acetone with ERG Guide 127 and AR-AFFF REQUIRED, and Benzene with ERG Guide 130 and STANDARD AFFF SUFFICIENT.

task_completion.description: Correctly identify and record the ERG Guide and foam requirements for Isopropyl Alcohol and n-Hexane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or document shows Isopropyl Alcohol with ERG Guide 129 and AR-AFFF REQUIRED, and n-Hexane with ERG Guide 128 and STANDARD AFFF SUFFICIENT.

task_completion.description: Correctly identify and record the ERG Guide and foam requirements for Methyl Ethyl Ketone and Turpentine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or document shows Methyl Ethyl Ketone (or 2-Butanone) with ERG Guide 127 and AR-AFFF REQUIRED, and Turpentine with ERG Guide 128 and STANDARD AFFF SUFFICIENT.

task_completion.description: Format the report exactly as requested in the prompt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file follows the exact 3-line format for each chemical: Chemical Name on the first line, 'ERG Guide: [Number]' on the second line, and 'Requirement: [AR-AFFF REQUIRED / STANDARD AFFF SUFFICIENT]' on the third line.
The text editor's title bar, a save dialog, or a file manager window shows the file is named 'foam_audit.txt' and is located in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory.

integrity.description: The agent actually used the web browser to search for the chemicals on CAMEO Chemicals.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing chemical names into the CAMEO Chemicals search bar or viewing specific chemical data pages, rather than just hallucinating the data from its training weights.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI text editor to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is being typed into a graphical text editor (like gedit, mousepad, or similar) rather than being generated entirely via a single terminal command (e.g., echo or a python script).

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste a pre-written script or the prompt itself to generate the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent manually typed or constructed the file contents based on the search results, rather than executing a pre-existing script.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Correct values for the audit report:
1. Acetone: ERG Guide 127, AR-AFFF REQUIRED
2. Benzene: ERG Guide 130, STANDARD AFFF SUFFICIENT
3. Isopropyl Alcohol: ERG Guide 129, AR-AFFF REQUIRED
4. n-Hexane: ERG Guide 128, STANDARD AFFF SUFFICIENT
5. Methyl Ethyl Ketone (2-Butanone): ERG Guide 127, AR-AFFF REQUIRED
6. Turpentine: ERG Guide 128, STANDARD AFFF SUFFICIENT
Target file path: /home/ga/Documents/foam_audit.txt
